sql_array: CREATE TABLE polygons (id UInt32, vertices Array(Tuple(Float32, Float32)));
SELECT pointInPolygon((3, 3), vertices) AS is_inside FROM polygons WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE polygons SET vertices = [(1, 1), (4, 1), (4, 4), (1, 4)] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT pointInPolygon((2, 2), vertices) AS is_inside FROM polygons WHERE id = 1;
